--- grant_on_all_views_in_schema.sql
GRANT SELECT ON ALL VIEWS IN SCHEMA sch TO ROLE r

--- AST
&ast.Grant{
  Privilege: &ast.SelectPrivilegeOnAllViewsInSchema{
    Select:  6,
    Schemas: []*ast.Path{
      &ast.Path{
        Idents: []*ast.Ident{
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 36,
            NameEnd: 39,
            Name:    "sch",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Roles: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 48,
      NameEnd: 49,
      Name:    "r",
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRANT SELECT ON ALL VIEWS IN SCHEMA sch TO ROLE r
